title: mellow citrusy slovakian blackcurrant jam galette
description: a romantic vegetarian dessert featuring blackcurrant jam and a crispy bhuna pastry crust.
instructions: roll out the bhuna pastry dough to a thickness of 3mm.
spread the blackcurrant jam over the pastry, leaving a 2cm border around the edges.
mix the lemon zest, orange zest and granulated sugar in a small bowl.
sprinkle the sugar mixture evenly over the blackcurrant jam.
dot the top of the pastry with the unsalted butter.
brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling to form a crust.
bake the galette in the preheated oven for 35 minutes.
remove the galette from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes on a wire rack.
serve the galette warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
